The **2018–19 [ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/ISU_Challenger_Series "ISU Challenger Series")** was held from August to December 2018. It was the fifth season that the ISU Challenger Series, a group of senior-level international figure skating competitions, was held.

## Competitions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2018%E2%80%9319_ISU_Challenger_Series&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Competitions")]
